summary: Classified the mixed PR inventory shard without GitHub mutation. There is no shared canonical for this shard. Security-sensitive WhatsApp session-isolation refs are routed to central security handling. Closed PR #87589 stays closed. Open PRs with proof/check/review/maintainer blockers are kept open or routed for specific maintainer review; no close, merge, fix, or PR-creation action is allowed by the job permissions.
